label: Component VaR
description: Horizontal bar chart showing marginal VaR contribution by position, sorted by risk impact.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: applied — added isLoading -> Spinner guard (before method buttons and chart).

0.8.note: applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard.

l0.notes: 0.1 pass — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 pass — requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 pass — availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 pass — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 pass — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 fix applied — added isLoading -> Spinner guard (before method buttons and chart). 0.7 pass — adjustedVarData.length === 0 guard already present. 0.8 fix applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard. 0.9 pass — no dead code.

1.1.note: — reads adjustedVarData, varMethod, setVarMethod exclusively from useRiskData() hook.

1.2.note: — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); componentVarData from API; adjustedVarData is componentVarData adjusted by varMethod multiplier and regimeMultiplier.

1.3.note: — scope org filter propagates via scopeReductionFactor applied to VaR totals; position-level filtering via scopeStrategyIds.

1.6.note: — empty scopeStrategyIds uses full dataset (reduction factor 1.0).

1.7.note: — no reference data in widget file.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — reads adjustedVarData, varMethod, setVarMethod exclusively from useRiskData() hook. 1.2 pass — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); componentVarData from API; adjustedVarData is componentVarData adjusted by varMethod multiplier and regimeMultiplier. 1.3 pass — scope org filter propagates via scopeReductionFactor applied to VaR totals; position-level filtering via scopeStrategyIds. 1.4 pass — clientIds threaded through getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.5 pass — strategyIds threaded through getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 pass — empty scopeStrategyIds uses full dataset (reduction factor 1.0). 1.7 pass — no reference data in widget file.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ (real-time VaR), paper ✓, batch ✓. Read-only chart widget.

3.2.note: isBatchMode derived from scope.mode in use-risk-page-data.ts; passed to context.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same chart with paper account VaR values.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget. Data via SWR polling.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout).

4.1.note: VaR method toggle buttons (historical/parametric/monte_carlo/filtered_historical) all call setVarMethod — real state handler.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.4 (method toggle changes chart data), 4.8 (chart fills widget bounds).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all risk-bearing strategies. Shows marginal VaR contribution by position across defi/cefi/tradfi/sports.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: tests/widgets/risk/risk-var-chart.test.tsx — 12 tests covering loading/error/empty states, all four VaR method toggle buttons, setVarMethod call propagation, and asset-class legend. Per ui_widget_test_rollout_2026_04_24.plan.md Phase 5.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex colors in widget. Legend color items use var(--surface-*) tokens.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: text-[10px] replaced with text-micro tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.3.note: Uses Button from components/ui/*. Chart via Recharts.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no bare div onClick, no unlabelled inputs.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=3 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 needs human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Unique VaR attribution chart; no other widget shows per-instrument VaR breakdown.

relationships.notes: VaR method toggle is widget-local state.

dataContract.notes: adjustedVarData derived from componentVarData + varMethod multiplier in context.

gaps: VaR method multipliers are hardcoded in use-risk-page-data.ts; actual parametric/MC differences not yet wired
coverage.notes: Color-coded by asset class via getAssetClassColor helper.

findings.description: L0.6: Added isLoading -> Spinner guard (was missing; method toggle buttons also hidden during load)
L0.8: Added hasError -> error message guard (was missing)
risk-var-chart-widget.tsx — ~10 user-visible strings (method labels, legend items)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-var-chart-widget.tsx:50 — text-[10px] on method toggle buttons and legend
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed

findings.description: risk-var-chart-widget.tsx:19 — adjustedVarData already multiplies by varMethod factor and regimeMultiplier (use-risk-page-data.ts:172-175). No visible indicator in the chart header showing current regimeMultiplier, so users see shifted bars without a unit cue. Legend at bottom only shows asset classes.
findings.deferReason: Cosmetic cue missing; spec does not mandate it. Consider adding '×<factor>' badge next to the method selector when regimeMultiplier !== 1 (same pattern as risk-kpi-strip uses).
